name: Second Time Around Veal Stew Normandy Style (Mf)
recipeIngredient: Cored and cut into 1/2 inch dice
recipeInstructions:
1. Saute the apple in butter until almost tender.
2. Add the apple cider and reduce until almost entirely absorbed by the apples.
3. Add the veal stew and cream, then bring to a simmer.
4. Place the cucumbers on top, cover, and steam for a minute or so just to heat through.
5. Adjust the seasoning as needed.
